display.name: Embers in the Watch Post
display.short_description: The watch post should be dead cold, yet one clay brazier still holds a patient orange heart under the ash.

choices.label: Wait by the coals until your hands steady
choices.summary: The heat is small but honest. It gives your breathing a minute to fall back into rhythm.

choices.label: Rake through the tray for what was hidden there
choices.summary: A stamped metal crest drops free from the ash, still warm enough to sting your fingertips.
